mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) count FROM tags JOIN (SELECT ptr.problem_id, tag_id FROM problem_tag_relation ptr JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT problem_id FROM submissions WHERE user_id = #{userId}) su ON ptr.problem_id = su.problem_id) ptrs ON tags.id = ptrs.tag_id WHERE tags.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition}, '%') || tags.name IN (#{condition})

SELECT COUNT(*) count FROM tags JOIN (SELECT ptr.problem_id, tag_id FROM problem_tag_relation ptr JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM problems) p ON ptr.problem_id = p.id) ptrs ON tags.id = ptrs.tag_id WHERE tags.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition}, '%') || tags.name IN (#{condition})
SELECT COUNT(*) count FROM submissions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND YEAR(submit_time) = YEAR(NOW())
SELECT punch_count FROM users WHERE id = #{userId};
SELECT MAX(submit_time) FROM submissions WHERE user_id = #{userId}
